title: index property nested with Date values
description: Root `{[key: string]: {[key: string]: Date}}` — a record of string-keyed records whose innermost values are `Date`. JSON and binary round-trip both levels of dynamic keys; each `Date` becomes an ISO string on encode and is rebuilt with `new Date(...)` on decode.
notes: Innermost Date values serialize via their ISO string and restore with new Date(...); both index signatures admit every key, so strip and preserve decode identically.
